name: Yian Kut-Ku Training
quest-details: The key to using a Sword is ~C05speed~C00. Use your speed to get into the absolute ~C05best position~C00 possible! ~C02Current Point Multiplier:%d%~C00

name: Yian Kut-Ku Training
quest-details: Time to ~C05learn the Great Sword~C00. Evade more than you Guard and attack until the chance comes for a ~C05charged blow~C00! ~C02Current Point Multiplier:%d%~C00

name: Yian Kut-Ku Training
quest-details: It's Hammer time! ~C05Here is my new rap~C00. "That monster ain't a star! I hit it on the ~C05head~C00 and it's seein' stars!" ~C02Current Point Multiplier:%d%~C00

name: Yian Kut-Ku Training
quest-details: As Lance users say, ~C05Guarding is life~C00. Don't forget that! Guard against attacks, create an opening, then ~C05counter~C00! ~C02Current Point Multiplier:%d%~C00

name: Yian Kut-Ku Training
quest-details: The Light Bowgun has a new feature and it's called "~C05Rapid Fire~C00"! Learn it, live it, love it! ~C02Current Point Multiplier:%d%~C00

name: Congalala Training
quest-details: Now it's time for the ~C05Dual Blades~C00! But beware of smelly attacks! If you get hosed, ~C05make sure to use Deodorant~C00! ~C02Current Point Multiplier:%d%~C00

name: Congalala Training
quest-details: ~C05Nimbly~C00 return the beast's attacks, make an opening, and then unleash the Spirit Blade! That's the ~C05way ~C00of the Long Sword. ~C02Current Point Multiplier:%d%~C00

name: Congalala Training
quest-details: You're still a bit of a rookie, so let me tell you a great combo. ~C05White-White-Red-Yellow~C00, then you strike! ~C02Current Point Multiplier:%d%~C00

name: Congalala Training
quest-details: Say hello to a Lance with real firepower, the ~C05Gunlance~C00! From ~C05thrusts to Shelling~C00, combine attacks to victory! ~C02Current Point Multiplier:%d%~C00

name: Congalala Training
quest-details: Bow training has begun! ~C05You can use a charge attack even with a coating~C00! Keep your distance for maximum power! ~C02Current Point Multiplier:%d%~C00

name: Khezu Training
quest-details: This time I've prepared a Sword that literally spits ~C05flames~C00! It should ~C05lead to an easy victory~C00, so show off your skills! ~C02Current Point Multiplier:%d%~C00

name: Khezu Training
quest-details: The weapon you have is tremendously powerful, but has terrible ~C05Sharpness~C00. So ~C05charge it up~C00 and aim for the head! ~C02Current Point Multiplier:%d%~C00

name: Khezu Training
quest-details: Using a Hunting Horn means using ~C05Self-Improvement~C00! If you can't, you're finished! Just link ~C05White to White~C00. ~C02Current Point Multiplier:%d%~C00

name: Khezu Training
quest-details: When you see a Khezu's electricity wane, that's your ~C05chance~C00! Use Wyvern's Fire and ~C05blow it away~C00! Great, huh!? ~C02Current Point Multiplier:%d%~C00

name: Khezu Training
quest-details: I've attached a ~C05Shield~C00 to your Heavy Bowgun. With this, you'll have a ~C05perfect Guard~C00. You're allowed to be pleased. ~C02Current Point Multiplier:%d%~C00

name: Daimyo Hermitaur Training
quest-details: You ~C05can't break a Daimyo's shell with this weapon~C00! Thus, aim for its ~C05claw~C00. Attack it with a truly Devilish Dance! ~C02Current Point Multiplier:%d%~C00

name: Daimyo Hermitaur Training
quest-details: The ~C05fast-moving~C00 Daimyo can only be stopped by ~C05breaking its legs~C00! Strike as hard as you can and knock it down! ~C02Current Point Multiplier:%d%~C00

name: Daimyo Hermitaur Training
quest-details: Break down the skull on the Daimyo's back with the ~C05shocking attacks~C00 of the Hunting Horn! Attack with ~C05gusto~C00! ~C02Current Point Multiplier:%d%~C00

name: Daimyo Hermitaur Training
quest-details: ~C05Showdown time~C00! With the high Guard ability of this equipment, you can never be defeated! Show your true power! ~C02Current Point Multiplier:%d%~C00

name: Daimyo Hermitaur Training
quest-details: Stopping a Daimyo's guard will require a ~C05Sonic Bomb~C00. Then attack and you will see its ~C05pain~C00! Just be careful. ~C02Current Point Multiplier:%d%~C00

name: Blangonga Training
quest-details: Today, I have prepared a Sword with ~C05paralysis effect~C00. Use it to stop the beast's movement and hit it with a ~C05Barrel Bomb~C00. ~C02Current Point Multiplier:%d%~C00

name: Blangonga Training
quest-details: Fire is the ~C05natural enemy~C00 of a Blangonga. The weapon I've given you should ~C05break its fangs~C00 right off... Try it! ~C02Current Point Multiplier:%d%~C00

name: Blangonga Training
quest-details: ~C05Theory~C00 has it a head blow from a Hammer will stun, but the Blangonga's head is ~C05tough to strike~C00! So hit it when it's down! ~C02Current Point Multiplier:%d%~C00

name: Blangonga Training
quest-details: Enemies who move quickly have a ~C05huge advantage~C00 over users of heavy Lances. Shift strategies and use a ~C05trap or two~C00! ~C02Current Point Multiplier:%d%~C00

name: Blangonga Training
quest-details: Those ~C05silly enough to attack head-on~C00 usually end up as dinner! ~C05Find an opening~C00, then strike again and again! ~C02Current Point Multiplier:%d%~C00

name: Yian Garuga Training
quest-details: Dual Blades and ~C05Power Juice~C00! The perfect combo! ~C05Gulp~C00 it down and ~C05Demonize~C00! It's the winning way! ~C02Current Point Multiplier:%d%~C00

name: Yian Garuga Training
quest-details: No time to wait around for the perfect attack? Then ~C05hit and run~C00 by using quick and nimble ~C05draw attacks~C00! ~C02Current Point Multiplier:%d%~C00

name: Yian Garuga Training
quest-details: ~C05Enter a dangerous foe~C00! If you don't avoid its roar, the attack after will be your doom! Use ~C05traps~C00 wisely! ~C02Current Point Multiplier:%d%~C00

name: Yian Garuga Training
quest-details: Your enemy may be quick, but you can handle it if you pay attention! ~C05Guard and step~C00 your way to victory! ~C02Current Point Multiplier:%d%~C00

name: Yian Garuga Training
quest-details: ~C05Turnabout Time~C00! I've prepared armor to change the tide of battle! Show me your true worth! ~C05Dive into the fray~C00! ~C02Current Point Multiplier:%d%~C00

name: Tigrex Training
quest-details: The short range of a Sword means it is only suited for ~C05melee combat~C00. Focus on an enemy's movements and ~C05boldly strike out~C00! ~C02Current Point Multiplier:%d%~C00

name: Tigrex Training
quest-details: A blind rush forward will result in ~C05unimaginable~C00 pain. Avoid the front, and ~C05move to attack from the sides~C00! ~C02Current Point Multiplier:%d%~C00

name: Tigrex Training
quest-details: ~C05White-White-Red-Green-Red~C00! The key to victory! If you can't do that, ~C05White-White-Red~C00 or even just ~C05White-White~C00 is OK! ~C02Current Point Multiplier:%d%~C00

name: Tigrex Training
quest-details: Being able to Guard against attacks is the strong suit of this melee weapon! Pain is failure! ~C05Calmly~C00 fight to victory! ~C02Current Point Multiplier:%d%~C00

name: Tigrex Training
quest-details: An angered Tigrex is incredibly ~C05speedy~C00! If you plan to escape with your weapon readied, ~C05it's already too late~C00! ~C02Current Point Multiplier:%d%~C00

name: Diablos Training
quest-details: Listen! I've prepared armor with ~C05Hearing Protection~C00! A ~C05tremendous~C00 skill! Slice away... There's nothing to fear! ~C02Current Point Multiplier:%d%~C00

name: Diablos Training
quest-details: When facing a Diablos with a Great Sword, using Guard is key! Become a master of the ~C05Instant Guard~C00! ~C02Current Point Multiplier:%d%~C00

name: Diablos Training
quest-details: ~C05Life and death decisions~C00 happen instantly with a Hammer. You can't escape a roar, so ~C05use wisdom to stay alive~C00! ~C02Current Point Multiplier:%d%~C00

name: Diablos Training
quest-details: I've prepared equipment to increase your ~C05strength~C00! Use your Shelling and slicing to force the tyrant to ~C05surrender~C00! ~C02Current Point Multiplier:%d%~C00

name: Diablos Training
quest-details: Against Diablos, the shells you have ~C05won't cut it~C00. Look for chances in the fight to ~C05combine~C00 new ammo! ~C02Current Point Multiplier:%d%~C00

name: Gravios Training
quest-details: Did you know ~C05the first attack on a sleeping foe is quite powerful~C00? Barrel Bombs drive this point home. Use them effectively! ~C02Current Point Multiplier:%d%~C00

name: Gravios Training
quest-details: To get to a Gravios, first you have to do something about that ~C05terrible tail~C00! Find a chance and aim to ~C05cut it off~C00! ~C02Current Point Multiplier:%d%~C00

name: Gravios Training
quest-details: With your equipment, ~C05white gas will have no effect~C00! Huh? What about ~C05red gas~C00? That's for you to handle! ~C02Current Point Multiplier:%d%~C00

name: Gravios Training
quest-details: A normal attack will just find you on the receiving end of its ~C05counter~C00! Put up a fortress-like Guard and ~C05Shell~C00! ~C02Current Point Multiplier:%d%~C00

name: Gravios Training
quest-details: Using a Shield to defend against heat is ~C05unwise~C00, but your foe can't move during heat attacks! That's your ~C05cue to attack~C00! ~C02Current Point Multiplier:%d%~C00

name: Kirin Training
quest-details: If a Kirin's ~C05neck begins to shine~C00, be careful! ~C05You can't touch an angry Kirin~C00, so devote yourself to an escape! ~C02Current Point Multiplier:%d%~C00

name: Kirin Training
quest-details: If you don't have ~C05Spirit~C00 charged, your attack won't penetrate. Aim for its weak ~C05horn~C00, and attack with your full spirit! ~C02Current Point Multiplier:%d%~C00

name: Kirin Training
quest-details: I've prepared equipment that increases power in a pinch! It's up to you, ~C05steady battle~C00 or ~C05all-out assault~C00! ~C02Current Point Multiplier:%d%~C00

name: Kirin Training
quest-details: Staving off ~C05Thunder~C00 with Guard is an impossible task. ~C05Step nimbly~C00 to avoid the areas where Thunder falls. ~C02Current Point Multiplier:%d%~C00

name: Kirin Training
quest-details: ~C05How you go about hitting~C00 the small target of a Kirin is incredibly important. Firing wildly means you may ~C05run out of shells~C00! ~C02Current Point Multiplier:%d%~C00
